title: was going to
content: {#Zastosowanie#}{Konstrukcji ''was/were going to'' używamy, gdy:}{[=+mówimy o zamiarach w przeszłości=+/=+mówimy o niedoszłych planach=+/]}{#Przykłady#}{[=+I was going to call you, but I forgot.=+/=+She was going to travel to Paris, but the flight was cancelled.=+/=+They were going to buy a new car last week.=+/]}
